title: Flat Fire
description: literally what else do I need to say
body:
their is like one singlular use case for this pack, **and here it is!!!**
-----------------------------------------------------------
ok so yea there is a bug but its not that bad just btww untill i fix it                 
when mining with explosives in the nether (specifically the with beds) it makes this:![fire in the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8d4e4fa80b26ee83391dc212006ab827b3ba98_0.webp)
      look like this ->![flat fire in the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f32fd475a70b12877468b11bb6155618d774e9_0.webp)            ...it also make smoke less intrusive, and yes, it does make fire lower on your screen, _you're welcome_, here is more examples:
      ![before/after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67dbc1fbfb36b83e08c2be8209ff504b7d8e6229.png)
![bar of flat fire at bottom of screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a58a960ab2aeda3f57677467cbc6c745dbd7e3_0.webp)
      --------------------------------------------------
 here is the real rason this exists: so you can see where the actuall fire hitbox is because this new fire is the same as the hitbox
